description: BaZi engine validation dataset. Expected values are oracle-derived (never engine-derived); see SOURCES.md.

conventions.dayHourFrame: local civil time, optionally true-solar-time corrected

ziHourModes.rollover: day pillar advances at 23:00 (= lunar-javascript sect 1)
ziHourModes.split: 夜子时: day pillar holds until midnight; late-zi hour takes next-day zi stem (= lunar-javascript sect 2)

verification.oracleB: lunisolar: not applicable (out of range, non-UTC+8 historical system frame, or term-day month at day granularity)
verification.oracleC: sxtwl (Python): year/month/day (+hour via 五鼠遁 from its day stem), term instants exact
verification.source: Day pillar anchor: 1949-10-01 (PRC founding ceremony) was a 甲子 day — a widely published almanac fact. Year: 1949 after 立春 -> (1949-4) mod 60 = 25 = 己丑. Month: October after 寒露 (Oct 8) = 戌 month; 五虎遁 from 己 year stem gives 甲戌. Hour: 15:00 = 申; 五鼠遁 from 甲 day gives 壬申.

verification.oracleC: sxtwl (Python): year/month/day (+hour via 五鼠遁 from its day stem), term instants exact
verification.source: Day pillar anchor: 2000-01-01 was a 戊午 day (widely published in Chinese almanacs/万年历). Jan 1 is before 小寒 (Jan 6), so the month is still the 子 month of BaZi year 1999 = 己卯; 五虎遁 gives 丙子.

verification.oracleC: sxtwl (Python): year/month/day (+hour via 五鼠遁 from its day stem), term instants exact
verification.source: Year pillar anchor: 1984 is the first year of the current sexagenary cycle, 甲子年 (universally documented). June 1 is after 立夏 and before 芒种, so 巳 month; 五虎遁 from 甲 gives 己巳.

verification.oracleB: lunisolar: not applicable (out of range, non-UTC+8 historical system frame, or term-day month at day granularity)
verification.oracleC: sxtwl (Python): year/month/day (+hour via 五鼠遁 from its day stem), term instants exact
verification.source: Year pillar anchor: 1924 = 甲子年 (previous cycle start, universally documented). July 1 after 夏至, before 小暑 = 午 month -> 庚午 by 五虎遁.

verification.oracleC: sxtwl (Python): year/month/day (+hour via 五鼠遁 from its day stem), term instants exact
verification.source: Beijing Olympics opening ceremony (2008-08-08 20:00 CST), a heavily published example chart: 戊子 year; 立秋 2008 fell on Aug 7, so Aug 8 is already the 申 month (庚申); 壬申 day; 庚戌 hour.
